title: centaurea × antoniae
intro: Centaurea × antoniae, also known as the Antone Cornflower or Antone Centaury, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × antoniae include its ability to relieve digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties.
